name: bacnet-driver
description: BACnet data acquisition driver schema pack. Covers wire-level runtime state: data_source (driver instance), protocol_network / bacnet_network, bacnet_device, and protocol_object / bacnet_object. BACnet object-type vocabulary lives in the Mnemosyne pack; protocol_object carries a concept_curie field referencing the matching mnemo:Bacnet* concept.

data_source.description: A protocol driver instance that acquires point data

protocol_network.description: A network segment that a driver communicates over

bacnet_device.description: A discovered or configured BACnet device

protocol_object.description: A generic protocol-layer object exposed by a device. concept_curie references a mnemo:* protocol concept. Parent type for bacnet_object and future modbus_register / mqtt_topic / opc_node specializations.

bacnet_object.description: A BACnet object on a device. concept_curie is one of mnemo:BacnetAnalogInput, mnemo:BacnetBinaryOutput, etc. (65 standard object types)

hasNetwork.description: Data source communicates over a network

hasDevice.description: Network contains a discovered or configured device

protocolBinding.description: Links a protocol-layer object to an application-layer point

acquiredBy.description: Equipment's points are acquired by a data source
